email.subject: Unlock Your Next High Score 🎮
email.preheader: Zero sugar, maximum flavor for your marathon sessions.
email.body: Don't let thirst lag your performance. Whether you are grinding ranked matches or exploring massive open worlds, Coca-Cola Zero Sugar delivers the crisp, iconic taste you love with zero sugar and zero calories. It is the ultimate sidekick for every quest. Stock up now and keep your fridge game as strong as your K/D ratio. Ready to level up your refreshment?

youtube.title: Zero Sugar, Zero Lag | Coke Zero Gaming
youtube.script: [0:00-0:05] Fast-paced montage of a high-intensity FPS game, player looks stressed. [0:05-0:10] Cut to the gamer reaching for a single cold can of Coke Zero Sugar, taking a refreshing sip. Sound of the 'crack-fizz' is amplified. [0:10-0:15] The gamer smiles, focuses back, and lands a perfect headshot. Text overlay: ZERO SUGAR. REAL TASTE. GG.
